uplink.description: Status report, dry (no leak): temperature, humidity, water.leak false (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: Upstream input from the TTN example (deviceType 0xBE); expected.data authored by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.6, Temp 25.38, Humi 68, Status OFF) and mapping to the normalized vocabulary.

uplink.description: Status report, wet (leak detected): water.leak true (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (byte8 = 1 -> Status ON). Expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js; Status ON maps to water.leak true.

uplink.description: Low-battery flag set (high bit of voltage byte) surfaces lowBattery extra
uplink._note: Synthetic input: byte3 = 0x80 | 36 = 164. Upstream emits Volt '3.6(low battery)'; normalized to battery 3.6 + lowBattery true extra.

Synthetic input: bytes[4..5] = 0xFE0C = 65036; (65036 - 0x10000)/100 = -5.00 C, matching upstream's (0x10000 - tmpval)/100 * -1. Humidity 0x1388 = 5000 -> 50.00 %. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (Temp -5, Humi 50).

uplink.description: Humidity at upper bound (100%) stays in vocabulary range
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input: bytes[6..7] = 0x2710 = 10000 -> 100.00 %. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (Humi 100).

uplink.description: Device-info / startup frame carries no measurement (report type 0x00)
uplink._note: TTN example input (report type 0x00). Upstream returns device/version metadata; we report no measurement.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported
uplink._note: TTN example input (ConfigReportRsp on fPort 7). Config frames carry no measurement; we report unsupported fPort.
